default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant improvement in blog performance: 3x increase in impressions (12k/week) and 2.5x increase in clicks (125/week) over the past 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [New content strategy focusing on industry-specific, event-type, and persona-based articles to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Content refreshes showing positive results: 7,500 weekly impressions (up from 100/day) and 50 weekly clicks (up from 1-2/week)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Action items: Schedule call with Stacey re: service pages, compile list of target industries/personas, and continue optimizing top-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Blog performance:](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Impressions increased from 4k to 12k/week (3x growth)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Clicks increased from 50 to 125/week (2.5x growth)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [New articles generated 50k impressions in the last 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Last week saw a significant boost: 27k impressions (2.5x increase) and 200 clicks (2x increase)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Top performing articles include party planning checklist, event planning checklist, and how to create an event registration form](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Three approaches proposed for future content:](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
    1.  Industry-based (e.g., events for nonprofits, universities, B2B SaaS)
    2.  Event-type based (e.g., hybrid events, in-person, user conferences)
    3.  Persona-based (e.g., for marketers, CMOs)
  - [Decision: Focus on industry and event-type content, but also experiment with persona-based articles (about 10) to tap into potential low-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Action: Team to compile list of target industries, event types, and personas for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

### Content Refresh Results

  - [35 refreshed articles now generating 7,500 impressions/week (up from 100/day)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Clicks increased from 1-2/week to 50/week](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Top performing refreshed articles include "Supercharge event metrics with attendee data" and "How to create interactive content"](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### SEO Testing Dashboard

  - [Dashboard shows significant improvements in refreshed content performance](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [First batch of refreshed articles now generating 3-4 clicks daily (up from 1/week)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Impressions increased from 18/week to 500/week for refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Service Pages and URL Structure

  - [Discussion on creating new service pages for field marketing software and events](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Debate on URL structure: root vs. nested (e.g., /advanced/field-marketing/field-marketing-software)](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Decision: Keep new pages on the root, following the existing field marketing page structure](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Action: Schedule call with Stacey to get final approval on new service pages](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule call with Stacey to discuss and approve new service pages](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Compile list of target industries, event types, and personas for future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Optimize top-performing articles by adding internal links to product pages and long-form content](https://fathom.video/share/dLH9Hh2aJ6X5C8Vy_GVU8XNHit_S1cCP?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
